# ABAP Instructions

Use this instruction set when the task is primarily about:

- OO ABAP
- orchestration around AMDP or SQL
- validations
- exceptions
- ABAP Unit
- test-data scaffolding or insert-script generation

Load in this order:

1. `skills/sap-fpsl-abap/SKILL.md`
2. `skills/sap-fpsl-abap/references/abap-delivery-rules.md`
3. `skills/sap-fpsl-abap/references/test-and-exception-patterns.md`
4. `skills/sap-fpsl-abap/references/test-data-generation-patterns.md` when the task is scenario validation
5. `skills/sap-fpsl-abap/references/mandatory-attribute-checklist.md` when data shape matters

Keep outputs paste-friendly for Eclipse ADT and do not invent object or field names.
